commands.review_summary:
The PR trims trailing assistant messages from compaction-timeout recovery snapshots and adds helper regression tests for pre-compaction and current-snapshot fallback selection.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests +30. Total +38 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. live high-confidence reproduction was run in this read-only review. The source path is clear enough to be source-reproducible: current main can select an assistant-tailed compaction-timeout snapshot, and agent-core rejects assistant-tailed continuation contexts.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof and normal PR validation, not an automated code repair.

target.title: fix(agents): trim assistant-tail compaction snapshots
target.body:
Fixes #87472.

## Summary
- trim trailing assistant turns from compaction-timeout recovery snapshots before they are handed downstream for retry/replay decisions
- preserve the underlying persisted transcript; only the selected recovery snapshot is normalized
- add regressions for both pre-compaction snapshot selection and current-snapshot fallback

## Real behavior proof
- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` completed so the declared `rastermill` dependency was available in this fresh worktree.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/compaction-timeout.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.timeout-triggered-compaction.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts`
  - Result: 5 test files passed, 258 tests passed.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts`
  - Result: 3 test files passed, 244 tests passed.

## Author attribution
If this PR is squash-merged or reworked, please preserve author attribution for `Andy Ye <35905412+TurboTheTurtle@users.noreply.github.com>` or include:

`Co-authored-by: Andy Ye <35905412+TurboTheTurtle@users.noreply.github.com>`
target.author: turbotheturtle
